---
title: "Dhruv S. Kannan"
about:
    template: solana
    image: media/interim.jpeg
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 17em
    links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Mail
      href: mailto:dhruv.kann@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/dhruvkannan
    - icon: briefcase
      text: Vita
      href: media/dsk_resume.pdf

---

I study political economy and noodle with technology in my free time. 

This Quarto site is under active development. I am not normally a dog.
